payload.instruction: Read the support ticket and classify whether the customer issue is billing, shipping, or product defect.
payload.ticket: My package arrived on time but one earbud is dead and will not charge.

payload.instruction: Choose the better answer for helpfulness and groundedness.
payload.prompt: How do I reset my router?
payload.candidate_a: Unplug it for ten seconds, plug it back in, and wait two minutes.
payload.candidate_b: Buy a new one. Routers never recover once they glitch.

payload.instruction: Write a concise critique of the answer quality.
payload.prompt: Can I take ibuprofen with food?
payload.model_answer: Yes, and taking it with food can help reduce stomach irritation.

payload.instruction: Decide whether the content should be approved or escalated.
payload.content: I hate this product and I want a refund right now.
payload.policy_hint: Escalate only for threats, self-harm, or disallowed content.

payload.instruction: Rank the three summaries from best to worst.
candidates: The launch shipped on time and users liked the onboarding, but analytics broke for 36 hours.
Everything was perfect and no one found any problems.
The team had some issues. It was okay overall.
